title: Test Gatekeeper Functionality
body:
## Problem Description
The user has requested to test the gatekeeper functionality. This issue is to ensure that the gatekeeper is working as expected and to identify any potential issues or improvements.

## Evidence
No specific evidence provided. This issue is based on the user's instruction and needs repository confirmation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Gatekeeper functionality is tested and verified.
- Any issues or improvements are identified and documented.
- Gatekeeper is confirmed to be working as expected.

## Risk Level
low

notes: Draft follows the instruction and includes all required sections.
No repository-specific details are invented or assumed.
Acceptance criteria and risk level are appropriately vague given the lack of specific evidence.
